raw.message: Get New Characters and Fight Some Spectacular Battles

hook.summary: Static character art of Goku Ultra Instinct with a prominent 'PLAY NOW!' call to action.
hook.visual_action: Goku is depicted charging a blue energy blast against a vibrant, rainbow-colored background with glowing orbs.
hook.text_overlay: Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle PLAY NOW!

scene_flow: Static display of Goku Ultra Instinct charging a blue energy sphere.
Vibrant rainbow background with floating orbs creates a sense of energy.
Prominent 'PLAY NOW!' call to action remains fixed at the bottom center.
on_screen_text: Images may show characters' forms after Dokkan Awakening or the activation of certain skills.
Some characters featured in the video may not be available at certain times of the year.
audience_proxy: Male Dragon Ball Z fans and anime enthusiasts who enjoy gacha-style mobile games.
